creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #18)

Pardonne moi, but I don't care about other systems, I care about FreeBSD only. I'd also don't consider 'everybody else removed that' as a decent rationale — I consider that as our strength.

I may be wrong, but this is my vision:
1. Does software build? (Yes?)
2. Does software work? (Yes?)
3. Is there a direct replacement? (Modern implementation of format itself. No?)
4. Does software require significant effort to support? (No?)
